name: Garden Room
description: A serene room overlooking the hotel garden, with hardwood floors, a ceiling fan, and a private bathroom. Sleeps 2.

name: Ocean View Room
description: Wake up to the sound and sight of the Caribbean Sea. Our ocean view rooms feature large windows, a private balcony, and are furnished with locally crafted wood furniture. Sleeps 2.

name: Jungle Suite
description: Our largest accommodation — a full suite with a separate sitting room, kitchenette, and wraparound porch facing the jungle. Perfect for longer stays. Sleeps 4.

name: Shared Dormitory
description: Community-priced dormitory beds for budget travelers and backpackers. Shared bathroom, locker, fan. Sleeps 6 per room.
